hero.desc: Codex Desktop only supports Responses API. CodexBridge acts as a local proxy, translating Responses API to Chat Completions format for various AI providers, letting you use DeepSeek, MiMo, Qwen, Kimi, GLM and more in Codex.

quickStart.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
quickStart.step2: # 2. Open http://localhost:8787, add your API Key and save
quickStart.step3: # 3. Open Codex Desktop and use directly

features.title: Why CodexBridge
features.zeroCodeDesc: Add API Keys via the WebUI panel — no manual JSON editing required. Import existing configs.
features.compatibleDesc: Supports both OpenAI and Anthropic API formats, covering 14+ AI providers with reasoning and tool calling.
features.switchDesc: Switch between providers and models instantly from the console — no restart needed.
features.streamingDesc: Full SSE streaming support, including reasoning content (thinking) and tool call streaming.
features.secureDesc: All requests are processed locally. API Keys are stored in local config.json — never uploaded to any third party.
features.extensibleDesc: Just add one line in config.json to connect any OpenAI-compatible API. No code changes needed.

providers.title: Supported AI Providers
providers.subtitle: One-stop access to mainstream AI services

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.desc: Three steps: install dependencies, configure API Key, start the service

dashboard.subtitle: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Providers
dashboard.emptyDesc: If you have an existing config, click "Import Current Config" — all data will be safely saved.
dashboard.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.importDesc: Import existing config from config.json, including all configured API Keys and provider info.

providerForm.presetHint: Choose a preset template to quickly add
providerForm.name: Provider Name *
providerForm.baseUrlHelp: Enter the full request URL. The proxy will auto-append /chat/completions
providerForm.modelHelp: Enter a model name — the proxy will forward requests to the corresponding API

settings.title: Settings
settings.providerHelp: Select the default AI provider to use
